content.fact_text: Implements the AppOrchestrator class for managing infrastructure lifecycle and graceful shutdown of the ecommerce backend.

provenance_data.behaviour: Initializes PostgreSQL, Redis, Kafka, and HTTP infrastructure sequentially with robust error handling and lifecycle management. Implements graceful shutdown using a reverse-ordered registration pattern with a watchdog timeout. Ensures environment configuration is strictly validated. Supports health checks.
provenance_data.utility: Provides a central, production-ready bootstrapper to orchestrate application startup and lifecycle management for a complex microservice.
